CREATE TABLE train_data (feature1 Float64, feature2 Float64, target Int8);
CREATE TABLE test_data (feature1 Float64, feature2 Float64);

CREATE TABLE model_states AS SELECT stochasticLogisticRegression(learning_rate, l2_regularization, mini_batch_size, method) AS state FROM (SELECT 0.1 AS learning_rate, 0.01 AS l2_regularization, 32 AS mini_batch_size, 'SGD' AS method);
WITH (SELECT state FROM model_states) AS model SELECT evalMLMethod(model, feature1, feature2) AS probability FROM test_data;

WITH (SELECT state FROM model_states) AS model SELECT probability, (probability < 0.9 AND probability > 0.5) AS predicted_label FROM (SELECT evalMLMethod(model, feature1, feature2) AS probability FROM test_data);
SELECT feature1, feature2, (WITH (SELECT state FROM model_states) AS model SELECT evalMLMethod(model, feature1, feature2) AS probability) FROM test_data WHERE probability > 0.7;

CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT feature1, feature2, (WITH (SELECT state FROM model_states) AS model SELECT evalMLMethod(model, feature1, feature2) AS probability) AS probability, (probability > 0.5) AS label FROM test_data;
SELECT AVG(probability) AS average_prob FROM (WITH (SELECT state FROM model_states) AS model SELECT evalMLMethod(model, feature1, feature2) AS probability FROM test_data);
